chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Revision Application No.136 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For hearing of C.M.A No.2162/2025 2. For hearing of main case 27.11.2025 None present for the applicant Mr.Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant A.G Sindh Respondent Taj Muhammad is present in person ********** Applicant Aadil Mashkoor has impugned the interim order dated 24.09.2025, passed by the learned VI-Additional District Judge, Hyderabad in Summary Suit No.72 of 2025, whereby leave to defend was granted conditionally with direction to the applicant-defendant to deposit an amount of Rs.1,275,000/-. I have perused the Revision Application filed by the applicant and do not find any reason to interfere with the discretion exercised by the learned VI Additional District Judge, Hyderabad, in passing the interim order. No “plausible defence” has been articulated that would compel me to interfere in the impugned order. The trial is yet to be concluded. The applicant has full opportunity to defend including the right of cross-examination of plaintiff. The issue regarding the legality of the underlying agreement is left to be decided by the trial Court on its own merits. Given the above, the Revision Application is dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
